titleStmt.title: SII 17.692: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 692. (A.R. No. 636 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti samasta-sakala-bhuvana, etc., of Tirukkāḷattidēva Yādavarāya who is a well known feudatory of the Chōḷa king Rājarāja III. Hence the year 8 cited in the body of the record is probably the regnal year of the Chōḷa king.

This seems to record the gift of the villages Tirukkāḷattidēvanallūr and Muṉaimēḍu alias Tirukkāḷattidēva-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Chēḷa-nāḍu as a tax-free kāṇi, for the merit of a certain Svāmidēvar whose name is lost and who is stated to have belonged to the santāna of Lakshādhyāya-mudaliyār and who is also said to have been the preceptor to the Chōḷa and Pāṇḍya kings.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samasta sakalabhuvana maṇḍalikāśraya samastavidyodyānamattakaḷakaṇḍa śrī kāḷa hasti śa caraṇāravindamadhukara śrīmatveṅkaṭagiri paripālaka veṅkamahināyaka piṅdevilabdhavaraprasāda ndāpuri parivelyita kāñcīpuravarādhī śvara janottamā �ra pura basaribhuta rājāśraya cantra kulatilaka caḷukki nārāyaṇa sakalaguṇadhāma saṅgrāmarāma mahārāja yātavarāja śrīmatgotra goca
rasan=tāna śuddharān(āna) śrīmallakṣādhyāya mutaliyār san=tānattu coḷa pāṇṭiya pṛdhvi śvararkaḷukku svāmideva prasannaśivamuṇṭiyār makanār cāṇṭilya gotra jātarāya rāmanātatevaṟkum Eṅkaḷk kacciyarāya svāmidevarāna śrī śvara muṭaiyār niṉṟaiyūr nāṭṭup paṭiyūr kā yārkku naṉṟāka Akkacciyār l tirukkāḷattitevanallūrum Amarāparaṇa nāyanār celanāṭṭu muṉaimeṭāṉa tiruk kāḷattitevaccaturvvedimaṅkala kāṇiyum Iṟaiyiliyumākavum A
kkavum dhārapūrvvamāka carvvādityavaraiyum celvatāka kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku Eṭṭāvatu Aṟpacimāta mutal candrāditya varaiyum celvatāka kuṭuttom Idharmmam rakṣittavaṉ Aśvamedhasahasram paṇṇiṉa puṇyam peṟak kaṭavan Ittai laṅghanam paṇṇiṉavaṉ kaṅkaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvai koṉṟavaṉ pāpam peṟakkaṭavāṉ .
Digital edition of SII 17.692 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
